summary: Art Basel Hong Kong VIP previews begin today, March 25-26, with the fair opening to the public March 27-29, 2026. The 2026 Whitney Biennial continues in NYC, featuring free admission for under-25s. In Paris, the major 'Renoir and Love' exhibition is on at the Musée d'Orsay, and the 'Matisse, 1941–1954' retrospective has just opened at the Grand Palais. Global art sales saw a 4% recovery in 2025.
